nasb.text: Thus I have poured out My indignation on them; I have consumed them with the fire of My wrath; their way I have brought upon their heads,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: Therefore I have poured out my indignation upon them. I have consumed them with the fire of my wrath. I have returned their way upon their heads, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 所以我把我的忿怒倒在他們身上，用我烈怒之火消滅他們，把他們所行的報應在他們的頭上。這是主耶和華的宣告。”

ccb.text: 因此，我要向他们倾倒我的烈怒，用怒火灭尽他们，照他们的所作所为报应他们。这是主耶和华说的。’”
